nasb.text: Now in the second year, in the second month, on the twentieth of the month, the cloud was lifted from over the tabernacle of the testimony;

esv.text: In the second year, in the second month, on the twentieth day of the month, the cloud lifted from over the tabernacle of the testimony,

cnv.text: 第二年二月二十日，雲彩從法櫃的帳幕收上去的時候，

ccb.text: 第二年的二月二十日，云彩从安放约柜的圣幕上升起，
